Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award Per Ccp Sections 1285 Et Sea And For Entry Of Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-18-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONERS CITIGROUP GLOBAL MARKETS INC., MORGAN STANLEY SMITH BARNEY LLC, MICHAEL COLEMAN'S Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award Per CCP Sections 1285 Et Sea And For Entry Of Judgment IS Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court. JUDGMENT signed in open Court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
